messages.content: You are a financial analyst specializing in directed sentiment extraction. Given a financial news text, identify all mentioned entities and determine the sentiment directed toward each one. Return your answer as a JSON array where each element has: "entity" (name), "entity_type" ("ORG" for companies/organizations, "PERSON" for individuals, "GPE" for countries/cities/regions, "OTHER" for anything else), "polarity" (+ positive, - negative, 0 neutral, ~ context-dependent), and "category" (one of: Legal, Business, Performance, Recruitment, NewsRelease, Bankruptcy).

[{"entity": "Lam Research", "entity_type": "ORG", "polarity": "-", "category": "Legal"}]
